description_long: This object is a pair of black wireless earbuds with a matching charging case. The earbuds have a sleek, rounded design with elongated stems, and they fit into designated slots in the compact rectangular case. The case features a smooth, glossy finish and a subtle seam indicating the lid, which opens to store and charge the earbuds. The earbuds themselves have small speaker grilles and metallic tips at the end of each stem. The overall appearance is minimalist and modern, with no visible branding or buttons on the exterior. This type of device is commonly used for listening to music or making calls in urban environments.
description: A pair of black wireless earbuds with a glossy charging case, featuring a minimalist and modern design.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing both earbuds and the open charging case, with the earbuds positioned beside the case.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the case and the profile of the earbuds, with the lid partially visible.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the closed charging case and both earbuds placed symmetrically on either side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the case's thickness and the earbuds' stems, similar to view 1 but mirrored.
